purpose: Test whether completed one-minute taker flow and acceptance persistence can improve the current N20 entry without changing its external-liquidity event, stop ownership, global slot or fixed quality-tier exits.

data.source: Binance USD-M official daily 1m kline archives
data.event_window: 60 minutes before decision through tier-specific 24/36 hour hold horizon

causality.confirmation_bars: only fully completed 1m bars after the H1 decision
causality.entry: open of the next 1m bar after confirmation
causality.intrabar_exit: 1m stop-first when both stop and target touch

selection.concentration: development top10 removed R > 0 and validation top5 removed R > 0

promotion: Historical improvement creates only a frozen research challenger. Live remains CASH until prospective shadow, fill, latency and reconciliation gates pass.
